name: waya-plugins
description: Free Claude Code plugin marketplace by Waya — skills and tools for founders and operators.

plugins.name: pre-pmf-starter
plugins.description: The Waya Method starter kit for pre-PMF founders — personal Ikigai discovery, executive summary, mission and values, and quarterly OKR workflow. Four sequential skills that build on each other.

plugins.name: expert-onboarding
plugins.description: The Waya Method onboarding kit for new members of the Waya expert network. A streamlined personal Ikigai discovery, plus more skills coming.
